# Mijndert Stuij

> Lead platform engineer writing about cloud infrastructure, DevOps, running, and minimalism.

Personal blog of Mijndert Stuij, a lead platform engineer at Otrium based in the Netherlands with 17+ years of experience in AWS, Terraform, Kubernetes, and cloud architecture.

## Topics covered

- AWS and cloud infrastructure (SCPs, Fargate, service discovery, load balancers)
- Terraform and OpenTofu (modules, import blocks, dynamic blocks, config-driven workflows)
- OpenBSD (hosting, httpd, relayd, security)
- Hugo and static site development (responsive images, render hooks)
- iOS app development (CalAction)
- Running and fitness gear (Garmin)
- Minimalism and productivity
- DevOps culture and engineering leadership

## Key posts

- [AWS SCP Catalog](https://mijndertstuij.nl/posts/aws-scp-catalog/): Open-source Terraform module for managing AWS Service Control Policies
- [A static website on OpenBSD](https://mijndertstuij.nl/posts/static-website-on-openbsd/): Hosting a static site on OpenBSD with httpd, relayd, Let's Encrypt, and PF
- [Responsive images in Hugo using Render Hooks](https://mijndertstuij.nl/posts/hugo-responsive-images-using-render-hooks/): Modern WebP-first responsive images with Hugo render hooks
- [Config-driven Terraform](https://mijndertstuij.nl/posts/config-driven-terraform/): Using for_each on import blocks in Terraform 1.7
- [Reusable Terraform modules using Dynamic blocks](https://mijndertstuij.nl/posts/terraform-dynamic-blocks-modules/): Writing DRY Terraform with conditional dynamic blocks
- [Saving time using Terraform import blocks](https://mijndertstuij.nl/posts/terraform-import-blocks/): Config-driven import in Terraform 1.5
- [Avoid using internal load balancers](https://mijndertstuij.nl/posts/avoid-using-internal-load-balancers/): AWS CloudMap service discovery as an alternative to internal ALBs
- [Stop doing DevOps teams if you want to scale](https://mijndertstuij.nl/posts/stop-doing-devops-teams/): Why dedicated DevOps teams are an anti-pattern
- [Scaling a Mastodon community to 27k people](https://mijndertstuij.nl/posts/scaling-mastodon-community/): Running toot.community on AWS infrastructure
- [CalAction is now available on the App Store](https://mijndertstuij.nl/posts/calaction-now-live/): iOS app for importing .ics calendar files
- [Garmin Forerunner 570 vs 255](https://mijndertstuij.nl/posts/garmin-forerunner-570/): First impressions upgrading from FR 255S to 570

## Feeds

- All posts: https://mijndertstuij.nl/feed.xml
- Blog posts only: https://mijndertstuij.nl/posts-feed.xml
- Week notes only: https://mijndertstuij.nl/weeknotes-feed.xml
